name: Beelze of the Diabolic Dragons
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ベエルゼ
desc:
1 DARK Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. If you take damage from an attack involving this card, or from an opponent's card effect: This card gains ATK equal to the damage you took.
mnst_eff:
1 DARK Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. If you take damage from an attack involving this card, or from an opponent's card effect: This card gains ATK equal to the damage you took.
eff:

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Activates if you take effect damage
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Requires Attribute specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Does not require specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
